sourceExport: raw Confluence Automation JSON export captured 2026-06-02 17:55
redactionNote: Live Atlassian account IDs, cloud IDs, connection IDs, rule UUIDs, component UUIDs, checksums, ARIs, and page/space numeric IDs were replaced with placeholders. This file documents the governed automation shape; it is not intended to be imported as-is.

schedule.timezoneNote: The exported cron expression is UTC-oriented in the Confluence UI. The exported RRULE also retains an America/Phoenix DTSTART. Verify the UI-displayed run time after every schedule edit.

actions.name: Use agent
actions.agentInstruction:
Run the Release Drift Monitor daily pulse for fixVersion "Mobilitas 2026.07.10".

Release stage: Before code freeze
Code freeze target: 2026-06-23
Source-truth branch: develop

Use this existing Confluence page only as prior pulse/history context:
<canonical-release-drift-page-url>

Do not edit, append, create, or update any Confluence page.
Do not plan Confluence actions.
Return only copy-ready pulse content for a draft child page.

Include:
- Release metadata
- Source freshness
- PASS/WARN/BLOCK/UNKNOWN counts
- New or worsened drift
- Resolved drift
- Data incomplete flags
- Recommended human follow-up
- Copy-ready Current Snapshot block
- Copy-ready Trend History row

Do not make a final go/no-go recommendation.
Do not transition Jira issues.
Do not approve or merge PRs.

actions.name: Publish new page

destinationParentPage.title: Mobilitas 2026.07.10 Release Drift Daily Pulse and Actionable Findings

actions.destinationPageTitle: Release Drift Pulse Draft - Mobilitas 2026.07.10 - {{now.format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")}} UTC

operatingDecision.canonicalPageHandling: Do not let the agent edit or append the canonical page during the pilot.
operatingDecision.draftHandling: Automation publishes one draft child page per scheduled run under the canonical Mobilitas 2026.07.10 drift page.
operatingDecision.humanReview: A human reviews the draft child page and manually promotes useful content into the canonical page, preserving normal Confluence page version history.
operatingDecision.writeBoundary: The Rovo agent remains action-disabled. The deterministic Confluence automation action creates the draft page from {{agentResponse}}.

knownFollowUps: Consider changing the draft page title to include both America/Phoenix and UTC time once Confluence smart-value formatting is confirmed. Candidate: Release Drift Pulse Draft - Mobilitas 2026.07.10 - {{now.convertToTimeZone("America/Phoenix").format("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")}} MST UTC-07 - {{now.format("HH:mm")}} UTC.
Verify whether the scheduled trigger displays Monday-Friday in the UI despite the exported RRULE retaining BYDAY=MO.
Archive reviewed draft child pages when the canonical page has been manually updated.
